THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRIKUPETS, VLADIMIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOI, TUKMAN $1,150.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,150.00, THE JUDGMENT IS BASED ON THE TOTAL LOSS VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S CAR, ADJUSTED FOR ITS SALVAGE VALUE. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR ANY PREVIOUS PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF FOR PROPERTY LOSS; IF ACCEPTED BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
